archetype.name: Assassin
archetype.note: This archetype offers Improved Poison Weapon at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Poisoner
archetype.note: This archetype offers Improved Poison Weapon at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Improved Poison Weapon
feat.text: You deliver poisons in ways that maximize their harmful effects. When you apply a simple poison with Poison Weapon, the poison deals 2d4 poison damage instead of 1d4 poison damage. You don’t waste a poison you apply with Poison Weapon on a critically failed attack roll.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
